hero_hook: Every brand reaches a moment where the product is built and the real question is:
hero_statement: WHAT NOW STUDIOS exists for the moment when vision needs to become presence — bridging technical thinking, design sensitivity, and launch strategy to help ambitious brands land in culture.
focus: Consumer Tech, AI Hardware, Design Culture
about_p1: WHAT NOW STUDIOS is a cultural launch engine based in Los Angeles. We partner with ambitious teams building products with real use cases, real conviction, and real value — especially those at the intersection of technology, design, and consumer culture, with the ambition to define their category.
about_p2: Los Angeles is not just where we are based. It is part of how we think. As one of the world's most influential testing grounds for design, lifestyle, creativity, and consumer behavior, LA offers a real-time read on what resonates. If a brand can resonate here, it can resonate far beyond here.
approach_headline: Most brands focus too much on the product and not enough on people.
approach_body: A strong product alone is not enough. It needs a clear message, a compelling place in people's minds, and consistent reinforcement across digital and physical touch points. A launch is not just exposure — it is the beginning of market belief.
